name: BB:UBA : Excluded Geographic Locations
notes: Building block to restrict rules to events from a known geographic location. This BB can be edited to list any known geographic location that should be ignored.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Excluded Geographic Locations on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event matches Source Geographic Country/Region is not Other
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Excluded Geographic Locations on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches Source Geographic Country/Region is not Other
